title: chroot: unmount with MNT_DETACH instead of UnmountMountpoints()
body: Unmounting the container's bind-mounted rootfs with `MNT_DETACH` should unmount everything below it, so we don't need to use the more exhaustive method that our bind package uses for its bind mounts.

comments.body:
LGTM
Although tests are not happy.

@nalind ping!  Looks like you've some lint issues on this one.

```
./tests/tools/build/golangci-lint run
chroot/run.go:1279:3: ineffectual assignment to `removes` (ineffassign)
		removes = append(removes, roEmptyDir)
```
LGTM, @rhatdan PTAL and merge if it still LGTY
